$comment: Normatively defined by the AIP Step Execution Token rules. A Step Execution Token is a Registry-issued compact JWT, not an agent-issued Credential Token. The JWT header MUST contain typ='AIP-SET+JWT', alg='EdDSA', kid=<Registry step-execution keyid> listed in active_verification_keys.step_execution of the Registry Trust Record version current at issuance time, and aip_trv=<that Registry Trust Record version>. This schema validates the decoded payload only.
title: AIP Step Execution Token Payload
description: The JWT payload of an AIP Step Execution Token. The full SET is a compact JWT: base64url(header).base64url(payload).signature. Its iss is the Registry ID HTTPS URI and its sub is the actor AID.

aip_version.description: AIP protocol compatibility version. MUST be "0.3" for this spec.

iss.description: Registry ID HTTPS URI for the Registry that issued and signed this SET. MUST match the accepted Registry Trust Record.

sub.description: AID of the actor that claimed the Approval Envelope step. MUST match the referenced step actor.

aud.description: Intended audience. The Relying Party MUST reject any SET where its own identifier is not present.

iat.description: Issued-at time as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

exp.description: Expiry time as a Unix timestamp. MUST be strictly greater than iat. The SET lifetime exp-iat MUST NOT exceed the minimum of the Registry's step_claim_timeout_seconds, the lowest ttl_max_seconds value for any requested aip_scope in the synced AIP Scope Catalog, and the Tier ceiling for the highest-risk requested scope.

jti.description: JWT ID. UUID v4 in canonical lowercase hyphenated format. SET replay detection is keyed by (iss, jti).

aip_scope.description: Scopes authorised for the claimed step.

items.description: A compact-serialised signed JWT encoding one AIP Principal Token.

aip_chain.description: Ordered Principal Token chain for the actor AID in sub.

aip_registry.description: OPTIONAL. When present in a SET, this value MUST equal iss.

aip_approval_id.description: Approval Envelope identifier for the claimed step.

aip_step_kind.description: Identifies whether this SET authorizes a forward Approval Envelope step or a compensation step.

aip_approval_step.description: 1-based step_index of the claimed forward step. REQUIRED when aip_step_kind is forward and MUST be absent when aip_step_kind is compensation.

aip_compensation_step.description: 1-based compensation_index of the claimed compensation step. REQUIRED when aip_step_kind is compensation and MUST be absent when aip_step_kind is forward.

aip_engagement_id.description: OPTIONAL. Engagement Object identifier when the parent Approval Envelope is engagement-scoped.

jwt_header_requirements.$comment: JWT header requirements for the AIP Step Execution Token: typ MUST be 'AIP-SET+JWT'; alg MUST be 'EdDSA'; kid MUST be an HTTPS URI matching a JWK keyid in active_verification_keys.step_execution of the accepted Registry Trust Record version; aip_trv MUST be the integer Registry Trust Record version used to select locally pinned trust state for SET signature verification.
